segments.text: if you go back and forth between periods
of extreme motivation and extreme
laziness this is for you the law of
inertia it's a simple law in physics but
it also applies to procrastination an
object in motion continues to stay in
motion and an object in rest continues
to stay in rest we human beings are the
same if you're feeling lazy and not
doing anything just remember that you
need that extra boost of energy in order
to push yourself into motion and once
you're in motion you will find it much
easier to continue to do more of the
task whenever you find yourself
procrastinating on a task remember the
law of inertia and how it applies to you
the amount of effort it requires for you
to start is much more than what it takes
for you to continue to do the task so
remember it's just hard at the beginning
it's so much easier later
